arts.sum: Leeds returned to winning ways at 10-man Cardiff as the two clubs remembered their former player Sol Bamba.

arts.ttl: The poor Cardiff City v Leeds United player ratings as attack anonymous and player sees red
arts.sum: This is how the Bluebirds players rated in the 2-0 defeat by Leeds United

arts.ttl: Cardiff City were “absolutely petrified” of what Leeds United star was doing today
arts.sum: Mateo Joseph has been leading the line for Leeds United with a lot of all-round quality, and notched a third assist when he flicked a pass through to Largie Ramazani for an opener against Cardiff City. Setting up the goal was Mateo Joseph, dropping deep to win a loose ball against Cardiff’s centre-backs, flicking through the gap into the path of the Leeds full debutant.

arts.ttl: Joel Piroe on target for Leeds at Cardiff as Sol Bamba is remembered
arts.sum: Daniel Farke’s side eased to victory after Bluebirds defender Joel Bagan was sent off in the first half.

arts.ttl: Cardiff City 0-2 Leeds United: Pressure piles on Erol Bulut as 10-man Bluebirds succumb to fifth loss in six games
arts.sum: The Bluebirds hosted Leeds United in today's instalment of Championship action and lost 2-0

arts.ttl: Leeds United player ratings with Gnonto and Ramazani classy in Cardiff City win
arts.sum: The second half saw the domination continue for the visitors, but the chances dried up somewhat until Jayden Bogle was fouled for a penalty. Joel Piroe came on late to score the crucial second goal.

arts.ttl: Championship rivals pay heartfelt tribute to former Leeds United star
arts.sum: The Canton Stand at Cardiff City Stadium displayed a stirring banner reading "Sol Bamba. A tribute video to Bamba was displayed on the big screen at Cardiff City Stadium, showcasing his most memorable goals for the club.

arts.ttl: Cardiff City v Leeds United live: Kick-off time, team news and score updates
arts.sum: The Bluebirds host Leeds United in today's instalment of Championship action

arts.ttl: Leeds United debut wait could go on for months after Ilia Gruev warning from Daniel Farke
arts.sum: Largie Ramazani, Ao Tanaka and Isaac Schmidt are unknown quantities in English football and, as Ilia Gruev showed last season, there is no guarantee they will make an impact any time soon. Ironically, Gruev is one of the players who some fans may want to see switched out for someone more offensive, like a Tanaka, but the manager has warned new arrivals have no guarantee of hitting the ground running.

arts.ttl: Why Leeds United diehards are among 'most dedicated in EFL'
arts.sum: Bristol Street Motors have crunched the data for the number of fans who travelled on the road during the 2023/24 season and how many miles they racked up along the way. The Whites, who missed out on an instant Premier League return after losing to Southampton in the play-off final at Wembley, finished third in the research, which includes clubs from the Championship, League One and League Two. United are estimated to have sold around 63,000 away tickets last term, with the average fan travelling around 3,200 miles.
